The '''''Bew'a''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==History==
The ''Bew'a'' was part of the Imperials' efforts to stop the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] ''[[Link]]'' from alerting the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Fleet]] at [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]], which suffered an engine failure. The ''Bew'a'' arrived to prevent the Rebel cruiser from entering hyperspace while the ''Link'' was disabled and successfully captured.

{{Ship-stub}}
